pixelbar is ... right now What is this?

Meshcore Workshop @ Pixelbar Rotterdam

17 Mar 2026

Interested in Meshcore? It doesn’t matter if you are new to this or if you have sent hundreds of messages already. Everyone is welcome!

What to expect
In this workshop, we’re going to flash a meshcore companion device.
And use it to send out our first messages.

For the more advanced Meshcore users, we’re going to go over how to manage a repeater, and how to perform an ‘over-the-air’ update.

Preparations
It’s not required to bring your own hardware, but if you want to fully participate, we recommend:

  • A meshcore companion device, like a Heltec v3//v4, or a LilyGO T-Deck. There will be a few SenseCAP Trackers available for people without a device.
  • A laptop ( Windows / Mac / Linux) to flash the device.
  • For more advanced users, a meshcore repeater device, to practice an OTA update

At the end of the workshop, you’ll be ready to send messages in the Meshcore community!

Location
The Meshcore Workshop is hosted at Hackerspace Pixelbar. We are at Schiemond 20, 3024 EE Rotterdam. This is inside “De Kroon”, follow the signs for K14.
If you’re coming with public transportation: you can go to Tram stop Schiemond or Metro Station Delfshaven and then walk towards the harbor.
To access the space you need to go up a set stairs, we sadly don’t have an elevator.

INFO Meshcore Workshop

🗓 Saturday 28 March 2026
🕛 14:00 till 18:00
💸 Free entrance
📍 Schiemond 20, 3024 EE, Rotterdam, inside “De Kroon” at K14.1.01
